extraction.one_line_summary: POGACAR Tadej attacked multiple times in final 3km on Cortals d'Encamp MTF, dropped Quintana by 23 seconds to win Stage 9
tactical_patterns: LOPEZ Miguel Angel attacked 18km out but Movistar ordered domestique SOLER to quit working, sabotaging own teammate's GC gain.
POGACAR repeatedly attacked after being caught by QUINTANA/VALVERDE group, wore them down through persistence rather than single explosive move.
QUINTANA sat on ROGLIC wheel despite having three Movistar teammates present, allowing rival to control chase instead of using numbers.
Crash during TV blackout destroyed LOPEZ's GC ambitions, dropping from leading break to 1:01 behind while Movistar played team politics.

rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: At 20 years old, won Tour de l'Avenir, California, Algarve, now first GT stage via repeated attacks against experienced climbers
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: negative: Crashed during weather-related TV blackout after strong 18km solo attempt, lost over a minute and team support simultaneously
rider_signals.SOLER Marc: negative: Visibly furious when ordered to stop working for Lopez and wait for Quintana, exposing Movistar's GC hierarchy confusion
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: neutral: Took red jersey but relied on Roglic's pacing instead of deploying three Movistar teammates, lost 23sec to Pogacar
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: negative: Set own tempo on front despite being isolated against three Movistar riders, poor tactical awareness of numbers disadvantage
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: negative: Couldn't match Pogacar's accelerations in final 3km despite being with lead group, showing age limitations on explosive efforts
